title: Stockport vs Wycombe Prediction, Betting Tips, Lineups & Odds | 03 Apr 2026
text: Stockport vs Wycombe match preview for 3 April 2026 in League One. Stockport lineup: Corey Addai (GK), Josh Dacres-Cogley, Joseph Olowu, Ethan Pye, Ben Osborn, Oliver Norwood, Odin Bailey, Jack Diamond, Tanto Olaofe, Josh Stokes, Kyle Wootton. Stockport are unbeaten in their last four matches and picked up an impressive 3-0 victory over eighth-placed Wycombe Wanderers on Friday. Goals from Odin Bailey, Isaac Olaofe and Adama Sidibeh earned them all three points. Wycombe Wanderers attacking threats include Cauley Woodrow, Connor Taylor and Fred Onyedinma. Nathan Lowe expected to lead the line for Wycombe.
